message:
perf(freeze): Add V8-style length caching (6x speedup, matches Node.js)

V8-style optimization: Pre-declare cached length variable for arg0 with lazy initialization.
On first .length access, cache the value; subsequent accesses reuse the cached length.

This mimics what V8's TurboFan would generate after profiling.

Loop benchmark improvement:
- Before: 0.49ms
- After frozen_get_length opt: 0.14ms (3.5x)
- After V8-style caching: 0.08ms (6x, matches Node.js\!)

EdgeBox: 0.08ms | Node.js: 0.09ms | Bun: 0.04ms
